scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/identity-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/listing-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/feed-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/trust-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/web"
scripts.dev:api: concurrently "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/identity-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/listing-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/feed-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/trust-service" "npm run dev -w @upaadhi/api-gateway"
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:performance
